series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with data regarding the number of park visitors at individual state parks, as well as the number of visitors to specific day-use areas.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years, then destroy. If paper records are scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
